channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Browns QB Deshaun Watson's season ended by ruptured Achilles tendon, team said he'll have surgery
item.description: CLEVELAND (AP) — Deshaun Watson won't finish the season as Cleveland's starting quarterback for the second straight year. He's injured again, and the Browns have new problems.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Tiger Woods to make TGL indoor league debut the 2nd week of the season after NFL wild-card weekend
item.description: Tiger Woods makes his debut in the second week of the indoor TMRW Golf League, part of a schedule released Monday that has the six teams wrapping up the inaugural season on ESPN two weeks before the Masters.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Dodgers finish off Mets with 10-5 win in NLCS
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Shohei Ohtani carried the injury-riddled Los Angeles Dodgers to baseball's best record during the regular season. Tommy Edman joined the team in late July and helped them reach the World Series. It's been that kind of year for the big-spending Dodgers.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Pennsylvania high school football team dominates opponent despite having just 11 players
item.description: It's common for football teams to seek out as much depth as possible for its roster, but a high school football team was uniquely shorthanded during a recent game.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Commanders rookie phenom Jayden Daniels slams helmet in frustration after suffering rib injury vs Panthers
item.description: Washington Commanders rookie quarterback Jayden Daniels was seen slamming his helmet in frustration on the sideline after suffering a rib injury against the Carolina Panthers.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: New York Liberty win first WNBA championship, beating Minnesota 67-62 in OT
item.description: The New York Liberty finally have a WNBA championship after beating the Minnesota Lynx 67-62 in overtime of a decisive Game 5 on Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: Doug Feinberg, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Juan Soto's 3-run homer in 10th sends Yankees past Guardians 5-2 and into World Series for 41st time
item.description: CLEVELAND (AP) — Juan Soto was supposed to be the difference-maker, the one who pushed the New York Yankees back to the top. They're one step away.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: CMU inducts BJ Russell into the Hall of Honor
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)—Colorado Mesa University recently honored two former athletes, linebacker BJ Russell and volleyball setter Jordyn Moody, for their outstanding contributions to CMU athletics.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Real Salt Lake legend reflects on his journey, leadership, and life beyond the pitch
item.description: Real Salt Lake legend and current Vancouver Whitecaps FC standout Damir Kreilach joins Royal Riot co-host Mattey Casey for an exclusive interview, just ahead of his much-anticipated return to America First Field.
item.dc:creator: Mattey Casey, ABC 4

item.title: Yankees get to Guardians closer Clase again, score 2 runs in 9th to win 8-6 and take 3-1 ALCS lead
item.description: CLEVELAND (AP) — Cleveland All-Star closer Emmanuel Clase gave up two runs in the ninth inning and the New York Yankees moved closer to another World Series, beating the Guardians 8-6 on Friday night to take a 3-1 lead in the American League Championship Series.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Tampa Bay Rowdies move to IMG Academy for final 2 regular-season games
item.description: The Tampa Bay Rowdies will play their final two regular-season matches at IMG Academy due to the impacts of Hurricane Milton and Helene.
item.dc:creator: Ashley Suter, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Former Bears quarterback Jay Cutler arrested for DUI, gun charge
item.description: FRANKLIN, Tenn. — Former Bears quarterback Jay Cutler was arrested Thursday in Tennessee for allegedly driving intoxicated. Officers responded to the 200 block of Bridge Street at around 5 p.m. in Franklin, Tennessee on the report of a minor traffic collision involving two vehicles.
item.dc:creator: Andy Koval, ABC 4

item.title: New renderings show how A's ballpark would transform Las Vegas Strip
item.description: Extensive details have been revealed about the proposed $1.5 billion "multi-purpose, enclosed ballpark" on the Las Vegas Strip that could become home to the Las Vegas Athletics MLB franchise in time for the 2028 baseball season.
item.dc:creator: Justin Walker, WGN 9

item.title: Tom Brady's purchase of a minority stake in the Las Vegas Raiders is approved by NFL team owners
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — Tom Brady has another new role in the NFL: owner. The seven-time Super Bowl champion purchased a minority stake in the Las Vegas Raiders, a deal unanimously approved by NFL team owners on Tuesday at the league's annual fall meeting.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Bears vs Commanders flexed to later time slot: NFL
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — The Chicago Bears Week 8 game at the Washington Commanders has been flexed to the late afternoon window, according to a press release from the NFL League Office. The NFL announced Tuesday the Bears’ Week 8 road matchup against the Commanders has been flexed to 3:25 p.m.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Aidan Hutchinson likely down 4-6 months with broken leg, Lions coach Dan Campbell says
item.description: ARLINGTON, Texas (AP) — Aidan Hutchinson is likely done playing this year because of the leg injury he sustained against the Cowboys, but surgery to repair his fractured tibia and fibula “went great” and Lions coach Dan Campbell said Monday he isn't ready to declare his star pass rusher out for the
item.dc:creator: SCHUYLER DIXON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Bucs with Bowles looks back at hurricane worries and one big win
item.description: Buccaneers Head Coach Todd Bowles stayed up most of the night last Wednesday into Thursday morning watching Hurricane Milton consume the Tampa Bay area with damaging high winds, torrential rain, and flood waters claiming spots that had barely begun recovery from Hurricane Helene less than two weeks
item.dc:creator: Dan Lucas, WFLA, NBC
